features.name: HELM Cell Rendering
features.description: Renders HELM macromolecule notation as structural images in Datagrok grid cells, supporting async rendering, caching, and multi-type polymers.
features.evidence_summary: helmCellRenderer, getHelmService, helmAsync, and measureCellRenderer share renderer naming and changelog history of async rendering fixes, caching bugs, and flickering issues.

features.name: HELM Macromolecule Editor
features.description: Provides an interactive HELM Web Editor (HWE) for creating and modifying macromolecule sequences directly within the Datagrok grid and value inputs.
features.evidence_summary: All three functions are registered as cellEditor/valueEditor roles for Macromolecule semantic type; changelog entries reference HWE and HelmInput fixes across multiple releases.

features.name: HELM to Molfile/Chemistry Format Conversion
features.description: Converts HELM-encoded macromolecule columns to molfile format and supports SMILES/CHEMS notation, enabling downstream cheminformatics workflows.
features.evidence_summary: getMolfiles converts a HELM column to molfiles; changelog entries describe pseudo-molfile retrieval optimization and CHEMS/SMILES support added in v2.13.0.

features.name: Monomer Library Management
features.description: Manages the monomer library used for HELM parsing, rendering, and gap handling, supporting multiple library providers and monomer highlighting.
features.evidence_summary: getHelmHelper exposes HelmHelper (monomer gap removal, library operations per changelog); Highlight Monomers operates on the same monomer vocabulary; v2.13.0 introduced multi-provider monomer libraries.

features.name: HELM Properties Panel
features.description: Displays a context-panel widget with structural and bioinformatics properties for a selected HELM macromolecule.
features.evidence_summary: Properties is registered as role widgets/panel with domain:bio for the Macromolecule semantic type, appearing in the context panel when a HELM cell is selected.

features.name: Plugin Bootstrap and Initialization
features.description: Handles plugin startup, HELM service registration, and dynamic loading of heavy dependencies for optimal performance.
features.evidence_summary: initHelm (role:init) and autostart (role:autostart, description 'Helm bootstrap') are the plugin lifecycle functions; v2.13.4 changelog explicitly notes startup performance improvement via dynamic imports.
